response.overview: Amidst heavy trials and the exhausting burdens of his daily life, a devoted servant begins to question the silent skies, wondering if heaven has completely abandoned him. As the weight of the world grows heavier, he must journey through his own deep loneliness and failing health to find where a weeping heart can draw its strength.  Set against a quiet, melancholic landscape, this touching drama explores the thin line between a person's spiritual calling and their fragile human realities. It is a story of faith, perseverance, and the invisible bonds of community that remind us we never truly walk alone.
response.title: Ang Ika-Apat nga Pulong
